name: Gauss Flayer
effect: Strips target atom by atom — damage ramps up over sustained fire. More effective the longer contact is maintained.

name: Void Blade
effect: Dimensionally-sharpened edge ignores all armor — cuts without resistance regardless of plating thickness.

name: Staff of the Overlord
effect: Low direct damage. Grants +15% damage aura to all Revenant units within 25m. Command weapon.

name: Necrodermis Shell
effect: +35% HP, +1.5% HP/sec passive regen. −20% movement speed. Walking bunker of living metal.

name: Resurrection Shroud
effect: +10% Reanimation chance (stacks additively with faction base of 15%). Total base 25% before tech upgrades.

name: Resurrection Orb
effect: On death: all Revenant units within 15m receive +25% Reanimation chance for 10 seconds.

name: Chronometron
effect: Passive aura slows all enemies within 15m by 25% for 8 seconds after activation.

name: Entropic Charge
effect: Target armor degrades 5% per hit (cumulative, persists for the battle). 10 hits = −50% armor.

name: Hybrid Gauss/Kinetic Slug
effect: Physical kinetic projectile wrapped in gauss containment field. +15% damage vs BOTH Vorax AND Core Guardians. Limited production.

name: Temporal Stasis Field
effect: On unit death: all enemies within 10m are frozen for 3 seconds. Even death serves the Legion.
